title: Phase 3E: Admin - approvals, audit log, security events, access simulator
description: Build approval policy management (list, editor with requester/approver roles, thresholds, escalation), audit log viewer, security event viewer, and access simulation tool.
steps: Create src/lib/services/approval.service.ts with approval policy CRUD and request management
Implement approval chain: requester roles, approver roles, thresholds, timeout, escalation rules
Create src/app/api/audit/route.ts with filterable audit log endpoint
Implement filters: actor, entity type, action, date range, branch
Create src/app/(dashboard)/admin/access-simulator/page.tsx to preview what a user/role can see
